_meta.hint: ensure conv word count strictly within 68-105 to fix the conv-words quality check failure

items.situation: a student asking a TA about a makeup chemistry quiz after being sick

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Hi, I missed the chemistry quiz last Thursday because I had the flu. Can I still take it?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Sure. Professor Lee handles makeups. She's holding office hours tomorrow from two until four.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Oh, I have lab tomorrow afternoon. Is Friday possible instead?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Friday works. Just email her by tonight so she can pull a fresh copy.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Got it. Do I need a doctor's note for proof?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Yep, bring it to her office along with your student ID.

questions.stem: What does the man tell the woman about Professor Lee's office hours?

options.A: They are scheduled tomorrow afternoon from two to four
options.B: They were cancelled because of the recent holiday
options.C: They have moved permanently to Friday afternoons
options.D: They are only available by appointment this week

questions.explanation: 男生明确说Professor Lee明天from two until four有办公室时间，所以A正确。B、C、D都没有在对话里出现，是话题相关但未被提及的干扰项。

questions.stem: What will the woman most likely do next?

options.A: Drop by Professor Lee's office tomorrow afternoon
options.B: Retake the entire chemistry course next semester
options.C: Email Professor Lee tonight and bring her note Friday
options.D: Ask another student to share the quiz answers

questions.explanation: 女生明天下午有lab所以不能去，男生建议Friday并要她今晚email，还要带医生证明，所以C正确。A被她自己排除（lab冲突）；B属于过度推断，没人提过重修；D完全不在对话中。

items.situation: two students discussing a botanical garden orchid exhibit they recently visited

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Did you finally make it to the botanical garden's orchid exhibit?

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Yes! Honestly, the rare cloud-forest section completely blew me away.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Oh, I missed that part. I spent most of my time at the carnivorous plants display.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Really? Was it worth it? The online reviews were pretty mixed.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Definitely. They had a live pitcher plant demonstration every hour. It's not in the brochure though.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Wow, I have to go back. Did you grab a seedling kit at the gift shop?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: No, a friend told me those sold out by Sunday afternoon.

questions.stem: What did the man find most worthwhile at the exhibit?

options.A: The rare cloud-forest orchid display section
options.B: The botanical garden's online reviews and brochure
options.C: The hourly live pitcher plant demonstration
options.D: The seedling kits sold at the small gift shop

questions.explanation: 男生明说Carnivorous plants部分的pitcher plant demonstration绝对值得，所以C正确。A是女生最喜欢的部分，属misattributed；B只是被提到，男生没说有价值；D男生没买到，是相关但非他喜欢的。

questions.stem: What will the woman most likely do next?

options.A: Return to the garden to see the pitcher plant demonstration
options.B: Order a botanical seedling kit through an online store
options.C: Write a negative review based on the man's comments
options.D: Skip the orchid section on her next garden visit

questions.explanation: 女生说"I have to go back"，男生刚刚强烈推荐了pitcher plant demonstration，所以她最可能去看，A正确。B无依据；C与她的态度相反，过度推断；D她已经表达对orchid喜爱，与对话相反。

items.situation: a student asking the registrar about withdrawing from a class after the deadline

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Hi, I need to drop my statistics class. The deadline already passed, right?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Yeah, last Friday. Late withdrawals need a signed petition from your academic advisor.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Will it still show as a regular W on my transcript, or a failing grade?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: If approved, just a standard W with no GPA impact. If denied, the course stays.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Stressful. Can my advisor sign remotely? She's at a conference until Wednesday.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: She can email a scan, but the original signature must reach our office by month-end.

questions.stem: What is the woman mainly trying to do?

options.A: Switch her statistics section to a different professor
options.B: Withdraw from her statistics class after the official deadline
options.C: Argue that her low statistics grade is unfair this term
options.D: Confirm that her transcript has no failing grades listed

questions.explanation: 女生一开口就说"I need to drop my statistics class"，整段对话围绕逾期退课流程，所以B正确。A、C都不是对话内容；D只是顺带询问的细节，不是主要目的。

questions.stem: What does the man say about the advisor's signature requirement?

options.A: It must be delivered to the office only in person
options.B: A statement from a doctor can substitute for the signature
options.C: Permission from the statistics professor is also required
options.D: An emailed scan works, but the original is due by month-end

questions.explanation: 男生明确说She can email a scan，但the original signature must reach our office by month-end，所以D正确。A与对话相反（可以先发扫描件）；B、C都没在对话中提到，是相关但未被陈述。
